creator: svysh@cryptocom.ru
text:
Please remove port security/p5-openxpki-client-soap-lite because:

1) it is a subordinate port for the main port security/p5-openxpki
2) its functionality is no longer used by the main port
3) it is not possible to use this port without support from the main port
4) its basic distribution is no longer maintained by developers
   (actually it is removed from the developers' site)

I do not think that an entry to UPDATING is necessary, as nobody could make use of this port in the present situation.

Fix: 

remove port security/p5-openxpki-client-soap-lite
